description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a fenced yard with a mix of grass and paved surfaces. The structure features a modern, boxy design with flat roofs and large rectangular windows, some of which are grouped together for natural lighting. The front facade includes a prominent bay window and a small entryway, while the rear and sides are more utilitarian with fewer windows. The property is bordered by a tall privacy fence and includes mature trees in the yard, adding greenery and shade. A driveway leads to a small garage or carport structure at the back corner, and the overall layout is open and accessible. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, giving the bungalow a clean and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a bay window on the front, and a fenced yard with grass, trees, and a driveway leading to a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, and a large grassy yard bordered by a fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the driveway leading to the garage at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage/carport, mature trees, and the back fence with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the expanse of the yard, side windows, and the paved driveway area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows, bay window on front facade
